case_title: BRENDA PEOPLES THOMAS DDS VS. LYNNE DANIELS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $280.00 FILED BY THOMAS DDS, BRENDA PEOPLES AS TO DEFENDANT DANIELS, LYNNE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-22-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

TRIAL RESET TO OCT-26-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF SEP-22-2015 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $180.00 FILED BY DANIELS, LYNNE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT THOMAS DDS, BRENDA PEOPLES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-26-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY DEFENDANT DANIELS, LYNNE AS TO PLAINTIFF THOMAS DDS, BRENDA PEOPLES
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY DEFENDANT DANIELS, LYNNE

SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF THOMAS DDS, BRENDA PEOPLES AS TO DEFENDANT DANIELS, LYNNE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-26-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE ON THE PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM TO DEC-02-2015 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DID NOT WAIVE SERVICE IN COURT TODAY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-26-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE ON THE PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM TO DEC-02-2015 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DID NOT WAIVE SERVICE IN COURT TODAY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 97.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF THOMAS DDS, BRENDA PEOPLES AS TO DEFENDANT DANIELS, LYNNE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-02-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE ON THE PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM TO JAN-25-2016 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DID NOT WAIVE SERVICE IN COURT TODAY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-02-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE ON THE PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM TO JAN-25-2016 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DID NOT WAIVE SERVICE IN COURT TODAY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DANIELS, LYNNE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $100.00 SERVED DEC-06-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DANIELS, LYNNE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-25-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-25-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT PRESENT. COSTS ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM ARE PER JUDGE MITCHELLL. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-25-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-25-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT PRESENT. COSTS ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM ARE PER JUDGE MITCHELLL. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-25-2016 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THOMAS DDS, BRENDA PEOPLES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DANIELS, LYNNE $280.00 PRINCIPAL, $135.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $415.00, DEFENDANT SHALL RECEIVE A CREDIT AGAINST THE TOTAL JUDGMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $320.00, AN AMOUNT WHICH HAS ALREADY BEEN PAID TO PLAINTIFF BY DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-25-2016 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT DANIELS, LYNNE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT THOMAS DDS, BRENDA PEOPLES STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT DANIELS, LYNNE
